issues.description: Gathering status is 'partial_gate_abort'—evidence collection aborted due to plan_audit gate failure. The plan_audit flagged AC-004's grep command as a missing file path, which appears to be a false positive. AC-004 requires verifying service layer separation via a grep command, not creating a file. The files src/fleet_memory/{store,embed,settings}.py exist and were verified to have no NATS imports.
issues.suggestion: This appears to be a systemic issue with how plan_audit parses grep-based verification criteria. The work is complete—consider reviewing plan_audit logic for command-based ACs vs file-based ACs.

issues.description: Player claimed src/fleet_memory/embed.py, src/fleet_memory/settings.py, and src/fleet_memory/store.py in files_modified/implementation_files, but git status shows no changes to these files. These files were referenced in AC-004 for verification but weren't actually modified.
issues.suggestion: Clean up the report to list only files actually modified this turn. Include verification-only files in a separate 'files_verified' field if needed, but not in files_modified.

criteria_verification.notes: src/fleet_memory/app.py created with module-level broker and app exports. Lifespan enters async_store_context and exposes store via broker.context.set_global. No @broker.subscriber decorators. Import test passed. Tests passed (4/4).
test_lifespan_enters_and_exits_cleanly_with_fake_store implemented using TestNatsBroker with mocked async_store_context. No real NATS or Postgres. Test passed.

test_startup_failure_with_unreachable_database implemented with DSN to closed port 65432, pg_connect_timeout_s=5.0, 15s wall-clock limit, password leak assertion, and ASSUM-006 verification comment documenting psycopg3 timeout behavior. Test passed.

Player verified grep command exited non-zero (code 1), confirming zero NATS/FastStream imports in service layers (store.py, embed.py, settings.py). Plan_audit flagged this as a missing file, but AC-004 requires command execution for verification, not file creation—this is a plan_audit false positive.

All 4 tests passed: test_lifespan_enters_and_exits_cleanly_with_fake_store, test_startup_failure_with_unreachable_database, test_app_import_succeeds_with_valid_env, test_no_subscribers_registered_on_broker. quality_gates.tests_passed: true.
Player ran ruff check and ruff format on src/fleet_memory/app.py and tests/unit/test_app_lifespan.py with zero errors. All lint/format checks passed.

rationale: Gathering status: partial_gate_abort—evidence collection aborted due to plan_audit gate failure (severity: high). The plan_audit flagged AC-004's grep verification command as a 'missing file path,' which is a false positive: AC-004 requires running a grep command to verify service layer separation, not creating files. All 6 acceptance criteria are verified based on available evidence (tests passed 4/4, quality gates passed except plan_audit). The Player's work appears complete and correct. However, per the GATHERING-STATUS GUARD, gathering_status != 'complete' requires surfacing as feedback for operational diagnosis. Minor honesty discrepancies (3 files claimed but not modified) are 'should_fix' warnings, not critical. Recommend: (1) review plan_audit logic for command-based verification criteria, (2) Player should clean up report to list only modified files.
